tagline: Complete Environmental Services Building Long Island Communities Safer

hero.headline: 65 Years Protecting Long Island Families
hero.subheadline: Since 1960, Clear River Environmental has been the name Long Island trusts for plumbing, septic, cesspool, and environmental services. Family-owned, EPA-certified, and always ready when you need us most.

services.headline: Comprehensive Environmental Solutions
services.subtitle: From your kitchen sink to hazardous waste remediation, we handle every environmental challenge your property faces.

cards.title: Plumbing Services
cards.description: Full residential and commercial plumbing — emergency repairs, water heaters, sump pumps, gas lines, oil tanks, and frozen pipe restoration.

cards.title: Sewer & Drain Cleaning
cards.description: High-pressure water jetting, video camera inspections, sewer line cleaning, and storm drain maintenance to keep everything flowing.

cards.title: Cesspool Services
cards.description: Cesspool pumping, location, aeration, chemical and bacterial treatment, inspections, and certifications for Long Island properties.

cards.title: Septic System Services
cards.description: Complete septic repair, tank pumping, inspection, new installation, and preventive maintenance to protect your property investment.

cards.title: Environmental Remediation
cards.description: Hazardous and non-hazardous waste remediation, oil tank cleaning, emergency oil spill response, and bulk liquid waste hauling.

cards.title: Commercial & Municipal
cards.description: Environmental solutions for schools, parks, commercial buildings, and municipal facilities throughout Suffolk and Nassau Counties.

steps.title: Call or Request Online
steps.description: Reach us at (631) 238-3684 or submit a request. We'll discuss your situation and schedule a convenient time.

steps.title: Expert Assessment
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on time, diagnose the issue thoroughly, and provide an honest, upfront quote — no surprises.

steps.title: Problem Solved, Guaranteed
steps.description: We complete the work to the highest standards, clean up after ourselves, and make sure you're 100% satisfied before we leave.

about.label: About Clear River Environmental
about.headline: Three Generations of Protecting Long Island Homes
about.description: Since 1960, the Clear River family has served Long Island with honest, reliable environmental services. What started as a small local operation has grown into one of the most trusted names on the Island — because we never cut corners, and we treat every home like our own. With EPA, IICRC, and CRA certifications backing our work, you can trust that every job meets the highest industry standards.

features.title: EPA & IICRC Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds current EPA and IICRC certifications, ensuring your job is done safely and to code.

features.title: Full-Service Environmental Company
features.description: From plumbing to hazardous waste remediation, one trusted company handles it all — no need to juggle multiple contractors.

features.title: Deep Long Island Community Roots
features.description: Three generations of serving our neighbors. We know Long Island soil, systems, and regulations inside and out.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. We provide clear quotes before any work begins so you know exactly what to expect.

guarantee.headline: Our Long Island Promise
guarantee.description: For over 65 years, we've stood behind every job. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. That's the Clear River difference your neighbors have trusted since 1960.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency response for plumbing emergencies, sewage backups, and oil spills across Long Island. In most cases, our team can be at your door within hours of your call.

faqs.question: Do you service both Suffolk and Nassau Counties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we serve all of Long Island including both Suffolk County and Nassau County. Our fleet is positioned to reach any location on the Island quickly and efficiently.

faqs.question: How often should I pump my cesspool or septic tank?
faqs.answer: For most Long Island homes, we recommend pumping every 2-3 years. However, this depends on household size, usage, and system condition. We can inspect your system and give you a personalized maintenance schedule.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team holds certifications from the EPA, IICRC, CRA, and EAA. We invest heavily in ongoing training to stay current with the latest environmental safety standards and techniques.

faqs.question: Can you help with oil tank removal or oil spill cleanup?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in environmental remediation including oil tank cleaning, removal, emergency oil spill response, and hazardous waste handling — all performed to EPA standards.

testimonials.name: Stephen S.
testimonials.text: We had a swamp gas smell in our house. Clear River's people arrived pretty much immediately. Professional and thorough service.

testimonials.name: Josh B.
testimonials.text: Clear River Environmental are the best in the business. Garrett has been to my house multiple times and always delivers excellent service.

testimonials.name: Jerry S.
testimonials.text: I can't say enough about Clear River Environmental. We unfortunately had a sewage backup and they handled everything professionally.
